programs.title: The Tourist
programs.desc: A man (Jamie Dornan) traveling through the wilderness has an accident.His car is rammed by a tanker and he barely escapes with his life.When he wakes up injured in the hospital, he doesn't remember anything.He doesn't know what happened or who he is.He tries to use all the meetings with people and the clues he receives to discover his identity and past.He must do this before his enemies find him.A suspenseful, full of mysteries story of a man who faces amnesia and a dark past.

actor: Detective Inspector Lachlan Rogers - Damon Herriman

programs.title: Sinners
programs.desc: The year is 1932. Twin brothers Smoke and Stack (double role of Michael B. Jordan), who have a difficult past, return from Chicago to their hometown in Mississippi.They try to escape from problems and a life of crime.They establish a music club for black people and hope for a new beginning.Their enemy, however, are dark, sinister forces that they must face.At stake is not only the lives of the brothers and their loved ones, but also their culture, history and memory.A dark cinema combining elements of action, horror and a musical drawing on the blues tradition.It is a story about an attempt at redemption and the fight against an invisible evil that symbolizes the weight of the past and past sins.

programs.title: Drag Me to Hell
programs.desc: Los Angeles.Christine Brown (Alison Lohman) works in a bank in the lending department and successfully climbs the career ladder.One day, an unusual client comes to her, an old and strange-looking gypsy girl, Sylvia Ganush (Lorna Raver).She asks for help in postponing the mortgage installment payment date.When Christine refuses to fulfill the order, the furious old woman curses her.He only has three days to remove the charm.After this time, the terrifying demon Lamia will take her to hell... An effective, suspenseful horror film, successfully combining elements of horror and black humor.The film was directed by Sam Raimi, author of the cult "Evil Dead", three parts of "Spider-Man" and "The Grudge" trilogy.

programs.title: Gaslit By My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
programs.desc: Morgan (Jana Kramer) is attacked by a masked assailant.A moment later, her ex-husband appears.His testimony raises concerns - has he come to help her, or is he hiding a dark secret?

programs.title: The Outrun
programs.desc: A young woman named Rona (Saoirse Ronan), who has recently left an addiction treatment center, returns from London to her native Scotland, to one of the islands of the Orkney archipelago.Because her parents are separated, she lives alternately with her mother, where she meets with her religious friends, and with her father, whom she helps on the farm.At the same time, she is still trying to cope with difficult memories - the beginning of her stay in London, where she started studying biology and often went to clubs with her boyfriend Daynin (Paapa Essiedu).She didn't even notice when she fell into alcoholism, which led to problems in her relationship and began to destroy her life.Meanwhile, while staying on the island, Rona decides to return to London.However, already on the ferry he feels that he is unable to control the urge to drink alcohol.He must re-plan his life.

programs.title: Critical Incident: A Death At The Border
programs.desc: Anastasio Hernández-Rojas died a few days after being detained by border authorities in 2010.Everything points to murder, but no one has been charged in this case.
